file.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

  merge_group: {}

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}

    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest]
        node_version: [20, lts/*]
        include:
          - os: macos-latest
            node_version: lts/*
          - os: windows-latest
            node_version: lts/*
      fail-fast: false

    steps:
      - name: Set git to use LF
        run: |
          git config --global core.autocrlf false
          git config --global core.eol lf

      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install pnpm
        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4

      - name: Set node ${{ matrix.node_version }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node_version }}
          cache: pnpm

      - name: Install
        run: pnpm install

      - name: Build for macOS
        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
        run: |
          export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"
          pnpm build

      - name: Build
        if: runner.os != 'macOS'
        run: pnpm build

      - name: Test
        run: pnpm test

      - name: Typecheck
        run: pnpm typecheck

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

    curl \
    git \

    python3 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

    && apt-get install -y nodejs \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

    git config --global core.eol lf

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -e

cd /app

echo "Running tests..."
pnpm test || TEST_FAILED=1

  exit 1
else

fi
